import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut sep = -1
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if sep < 0 and (b == 32 or b == 9)
      sep = i
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if sep < 0
    Err("no separator")
  else
    let a_str = string.substring(line, 0, sep)
    mut j = sep
    while j < n
      let b = match string.byte_at(line, j)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      if b == 32 or b == 9
        j = j + 1
      else
        j = n + 1
      end
    end
    let start_b = j - n - 1
    let b_str = string.substring(line, start_b, n)
    let a = match string.parse_int(a_str)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    let b = match string.parse_int(b_str)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    let r = a * a + b * b
    println("r=#{r}")
    Ok(())
  end
end
